km.Of, , Gerona, Spain: ហ្គីរ៉ុណា, ខាតាluនីa, អេស្ប៉ាញ

zh.Of, , Gerona, Spain: 西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo於1150年出生時，她的父親Gómez González de Manzanedo30歲，母親Milia Pérez de Lara30歲。她和Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1204年9月18日享年54歲。

zh-hans.Of, , Gerona, Spain: 西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo于1150年出生时，她的父亲Gómez González de Manzanedo30岁，母亲Milia Pérez de Lara30岁。她和Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1204年9月18日享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael.
Spanish (Gómez): from a medieval personal name, probably of Visigothic origin, from guma ‘man’. Compare De Gomez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

variants.name: De Gomez
meanings: Spanish (De Gómez): patronymic from Gómez (see Gomez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gomes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Francisco, Jorge, Mario, Domingos, Jaime, Julio, Luiz.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Catarina, Henrique, Agostinho, Amadeu, Ademir, Aderito, Aloisio, Conceicao, Ilidio.

Portuguese and Galician: from the medieval personal name Gomes, probably Visigothic in origin, from guma ‘man’. This surname is also found on the west coast of India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Manzanedo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: topographic name from manzanero, dialect form of manzanal ‘apple grove’ (derivative of manzana ‘apple’), denoting someone who lived in a place where apple trees are.

nameMeanings.name: Jimena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: from the medieval personal name Jimeno, ultimately from the Basque name Semen or Xemen, apparently derived from seme ‘son’.

variants.name: Jimenez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Mario, Rafael, Raul.
Spanish (Jiménez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Jimeno . Compare Gimenez , Himenez , Jimenes , Jiminez , and Ximenez .

en.lifeSummary: When Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo was born in 1150, her father, Gómez González de Manzanedo, was 30 and her mother, Milia Pérez de Lara, was 30. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. She died on 18 September 1204, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo est née en 1150, son père, Gómez González de Manzanedo, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Milia Pérez de Lara, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1204, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo 1150 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gómez González de Manzanedo 30 und ihre Mutter Milia Pérez de Lara 30. Sie hatte mit Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. September 1204 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo è nata il nel 1150, sua padre, Gómez González de Manzanedo, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Milia Pérez de Lara, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. Morì il 18 settembre 1204, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Of, , Gerona, Spain: スペインカタルニーアギロナ
ja.lifeSummary: Jimena Gómez de Manzanedoが1150年に生まれた時，父Gómez González de Manzanedoは30歳，母Milia Pérez de Laraは30歳であった。彼女はPedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1204年9月18日に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo(이)가 1150년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gómez González de Manzanedo(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Milia Pérez de Lara(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 9월 18일 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo nasceu em 1150, seu pai, Gómez González de Manzanedo, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Milia Pérez de Lara, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1204, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo родилась в 1150 г., её отцу по имени Gómez González de Manzanedo было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Milia Pérez de Lara, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. Она умерла 18 сентября 1204 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jimena Gómez de Manzanedo nació en 1150, su papá, Gómez González de Manzanedo, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Milia Pérez de Lara, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Pedro Fernandez "el Castellano" de Castro Lord of Paredes de Nava y Infantado de Léon. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1204, a la edad de 54 años.
